Name: Collège Alpin Beau Soleil
Tagline: Collège Alpin Beau Soleil is one of the most prestigious international boarding schools in Switzerland. We believe it’s what you do that counts.
About: We’re thrilled that you’re interested in joining the Collège Alpin Beau Soleil family. Beau Soleil is a home away from home to students from around the world, who form a closeknit community where everyone knows everyone, and every young person is encouraged to follow their passions.
Philosophy: Collège Alpin Beau Soleil embraces a holistic educational approach, integrating the Swiss tradition of excellence with a focus on developing well-rounded individuals. Our curriculum encourages critical thinking, creativity, and global citizenship, fostering lifelong learning in the heart of the Swiss Alps.
Outcomes: In our supportive, inspiring, and ambitious community, our students achieve outstanding academic success. With learning tailored to their passions and ambitions, our students are engaged, motivated, and in control of their education.
Admissions: The admissions process is the start of a lasting relationship between your family and ours. We’re delighted that you’re interested in joining the Beau Soleil family.
Quote: At Beau Soleil, we believe it’s what you do that counts. From character-building challenges and community service projects to alpine adventures and global expeditions, we offer an unparalleled range of experiences that shape our students’ futures.

Performance.Academic Integration: The range of activities on Global Campus enhances and extends our curriculum, providing opportunities for students to develop their problem-solving, teamwork, and creative thinking skills.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Focused Professional Learning Programmes also give our learners the chance to gain practical qualifications and skills. These include the opportunity to become a certified ski instructor or qualified bike mechanic.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Our students enjoy unparalleled opportunities to train with and perform with local dance companies. This unique aspect of our programme not only elevates their learning experience but also connects them with the broader dance community.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Our dynamic drama programme – enriched by specialist resources, techniques, and approaches devised by Juilliard – sees our students create and experience incredible live theatre. It also nurtures their skills and knowledge, and gives them the confidence to write, direct, and perform.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Collège Alpin Beau Soleil boast a 100% acceptance rate to prestigious universities worldwide, supported by consistently high IB exam scores and numerous awards in international academic competitions.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Collège Alpin Beau Soleil ensures ongoing accountability through bi-annual progress reports and regular parent-teacher conferences, complemented by its rigorous IB accreditation and a personalized advisory system for each student.
